_readme: Approved render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Every knob is pinned because the look is approved: a later change to a generic default must not silently restyle it. Knob WHYs live in NOTES 'Knob provenance'.
approved: 2026-07-08 (user): corridor-free defaults — cleaner, more natural, less noisy

notes.sep_engine: inpaint pinned: net passes the gate and every bound here but prints a striped bright-star shell (aura_lum +0.0 -> +4.0) — aesthetic, PENDING USER JUDGMENT on results/exp_starsep_sep_engine_20260709_163552/. This field holds no resolved object, so inpaint's structure-destruction failure mode cannot fire (its in-envelope detection fraction reads ~4%: Milky-Way-band stars, not knots).
notes.stars_anchor_basis: max pinned: the approved look predates the fixed G basis; the flip changes star brightness slightly and goes to the user's eyes as a declared delta before this pin moves
